dataset: Corporate reputation survey (mobile network operators), n=344, 7-point Likert scales unless noted

variables.name: comp_1
variables.label: [The company] is a top competitor in its market

variables.name: comp_2
variables.label: As far as I know, [the company] is recognized worldwide

variables.name: comp_3
variables.label: I believe that [the company] performs at a premium level

variables.name: like_1
variables.label: [The company] is a company that I can better identify with than other companies

variables.name: like_2
variables.label: [The company] is a company that I would regret more not having if it no longer existed

variables.name: like_3
variables.label: I regard [the company] as a likeable company

variables.name: cusa
variables.label: I am satisfied with [the company] (overall satisfaction)

variables.name: cusl_1
variables.label: I would recommend [the company] to friends and relatives

variables.name: cusl_2
variables.label: If I had to choose again, I would choose [the company] as my provider

variables.name: cusl_3
variables.label: I will remain a customer of [the company] in the future

variables.name: qual_1
variables.label: The products/services offered by [the company] are of high quality

variables.name: qual_2
variables.label: [The company] is an innovator, rather than an imitator

variables.name: qual_3
variables.label: [The company]'s products/services offer good value for money

variables.name: qual_4
variables.label: The services [the company] offers are good

variables.name: qual_5
variables.label: Customer concerns are held in high regard at [the company]

variables.name: qual_6
variables.label: [The company] is a reliable partner for customers

variables.name: qual_7
variables.label: [The company] is a trustworthy company

variables.name: qual_8
variables.label: I have a lot of respect for [the company]

variables.name: perf_1
variables.label: [The company] is a very well managed company

variables.name: perf_2
variables.label: [The company] is an economically stable company

variables.name: perf_3
variables.label: The business risk for [the company] is modest compared to its competitors

variables.name: perf_4
variables.label: [The company] has growth potential

variables.name: perf_5
variables.label: [The company] has a clear vision about the future of the company

variables.name: csor_1
variables.label: [The company] behaves in a socially conscious way

variables.name: csor_2
variables.label: [The company] is forthright in giving information to the public

variables.name: csor_3
variables.label: [The company] has a fair attitude toward competitors

variables.name: csor_4
variables.label: [The company] is concerned about the preservation of the environment

variables.name: csor_5
variables.label: [The company] is not only concerned about profits

variables.name: attr_1
variables.label: In my opinion, [the company] is successful in attracting high-quality employees

variables.name: attr_2
variables.label: I could see myself working at [the company]

variables.name: attr_3
variables.label: [The company] is a very appealing company overall

variables.name: serviceprovider
variables.label: Which mobile network operator the respondent uses

variables.name: servicetype
variables.label: Contract vs prepaid service
